commands.review_summary:
The branch sends generated image/music/video completions directly before requester-agent handoff, marks failed direct media sends terminal, and updates completion-delivery and dispatch tests.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +45. Total +66 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main can route successful generated-media completions through requester-session wake before direct delivery, and the linked beta evidence shows one image completion producing repeated message.send calls. I did not run a live repro during this read-only review.
